goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'afghan' food and should be in the 'centre'.
The restaurant should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should 'leave after 09:00'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve afghan food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from stevenage and should leave after 09:00
Make sure you get travel time and arrival time
